'''Clone Engineers''' were [[clone trooper]] [[engineer]]s of the [[Galactic Republic]] that were active during the [[Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. [[Cloning|Clone]] Engineers made sure that the Republic's vehicles were in top condition, and were equipped with specialized [[Phase I clone trooper armor]] and later [[Phase II clone trooper armor]]. During the war, the [[501st Legion]] deployed Clone Engineers.<ref name="Standing Out" />
